Bike Patrol Dashboard

Monitor report hotspots, response pressure, and community activity in real-time

Spot recurring issues before they spread

Track where reports are clustering, which issue types are rising, and where maintenance attention will have the biggest impact.

Total reports 0 No reports yet
Pending review 0 Queue is clear
Resolved cases 0 No completed cases yet
Active hotspots 0 Waiting for mapped reports

Hotspot map view

Clusters nearby reports so staff can see where recurring issues need intervention first.

Watch Busy Urgent
Hotspots will appear here after reports with location data are submitted.

Priority areas

Highest-signal areas ranked by report volume and urgency.

Ops snapshot

What the current report mix is telling your team right now.

Top hotspot Waiting for reports
Coverage 0 mapped reports
Recommended action Collect more field reports

Live clutter alert

Turn hotspot pressure into a positive call to action before space gets blocked further.

Space recovered

Show judges how much usable public space your community actions are winning back.

Space recovery metrics will appear here.

Return-and-earn missions

Quick corrective actions that reward users more than ordinary rides.

Log in as a user to see live missions.

Maintenance priority routing

Ranked interventions based on hotspot pressure, repeat offenses, and public-space impact.

Staff routing guidance will appear here.
Community Arena

Space-Saving Champions

A live competition board for the riders who recover the most space, complete the most rescue missions, and keep the town tidy.

Top podium

The strongest space-saving players right now.

Podium standings will appear here.

League table

Track score, recovery missions, streak pressure, and space reclaimed.

Leaderboard standings will appear here.

Your player card

See your current tier, score pressure, and next climb target.

Log in to load your player card.

Rivalries

Close score battles make the climb feel alive.

Rivalry cards will appear here.

Quest bonuses

High-value actions that help players rank up faster.

Return-and-earn chain Complete 3 corrective missions this week for a major rank push.
Clean finish streak Stack good-action streaks without incidents to multiply your climb speed.
Hotspot hero Clear a high-pressure illegal parking hotspot and reclaim public space fast.

Season rank ladder

Every player climbs this ladder by earning points from helpful actions, rescue missions, and strong streaks.

Log in to see your current climb status.
Rank thresholds will appear here.

Admin Control Center

Manage account health, onboarding, and intervention workflows without crowding the live operations dashboard.

Account operations

Create new accounts, filter risk, and keep user and maintenance profiles tidy from one admin-only workspace.

Admin overview metrics will appear here.

Create account

Spin up fresh user or maintenance accounts for demos and live operations.

Account directory

Search by email or display name, then act on streak risk, point health, and recent account activity.

Admin account tools will load here.

Submit Report

Location will be requested when you submit your report.

User Reports

View submitted reports from all users.

Review Report

Quick walkthrough

Step 1 of 4

Dashboard overview

Use the dashboard to understand what is happening across the bike network before taking action.

Tip: The hotspot section shows where reports are clustering geographically.
BikePoints Bonus

Earn points from good actions

Help the bike community, then get rewarded like a loyalty app.

Every verified action adds points to your wallet so you can redeem treats and perks later.

🛠️
Report faulty bikes

Flag damaged or unsafe bikes so maintenance can fix them fast.

🚲
Put bikes back in place

Help return misplaced bikes into proper parking areas and earn extra bonus points.

📸
Send clear photo reports

Good reports with photos and location details get approved faster and convert into points.

Points Wallet

Earn points from approved reports, then redeem them like a loyalty app.

Available points 0
Log in to view your balance
Lifetime earned 0
Recent activity 0
Good-action streak 0
Active multiplier 1.00x

How To Earn Points

Illegal parking report +80 pts
Faulty bike report +110 pts
Toppled bike report +140 pts
Other verified report +60 pts
Bike rental ride +10 pts
Proper bike parking +15 pts
Every 5 good actions increases your point multiplier. Ride and parking points stay lower than good-action rewards so the app keeps promoting responsible behaviour first. If admins suspect illegal parking, they can reset the streak back to 0.

Return-and-earn missions

Fix illegal parking, submit before/after proof, and earn a bigger corrective-action bonus.

Log in to see corrective missions.

Parking zone guidance

Help riders avoid cluttered endings with a simple good / risky / bad zone guide.

Guidance will appear after ride or parking activity.
Recovery guidance will appear here.

Redeem with Points

Log in to browse the points catalog.

Bike activity rewards

Log rental trips and proper parking to earn smaller usage points.

Mock QR scan

Use a dummy bike QR for now. Scanning links the bike to your account so parking incidents can be tracked back to the current renter.

Active linked bike None linked
A parking warning will appear here when you log a parking event in a risky area.
